name: @stimulir/code-runtime-codex
description: Stimulir-flavored Codex adapter. Spawns @rivet-dev/agent-os-codex-agent's `codex-wasm-acp` binary as a subprocess, translates ACP sessionUpdate notifications into Stimulir's canonical trajectory event shape, returns an AgentSessionLike with the same .subscribe / .prompt surface as the Pi adapter.
